MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-02-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
